attacking_style: Short, opportunistic attacks (700m) exploiting technical finishes or chaos rather than sustained climbing power. Prefers breakaway survival tactics over direct confrontation with pure climbers or sprinters.
team_tactics: Elite domestique work including valley pacing, tempo-setting for GC leaders before final climbs, and tactical intermediate sprint disruption. Team uses him to control pace and position leaders optimally.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain where diesel engine and tactical IQ shine. Technical finishes suit veteran skills. Exposed on sustained climbs where consistently dropped before summits.
vulnerability: Lacks sustained climbing power—repeatedly dropped on final climbs before descents. Pure sprint power insufficient against top-tier finishers. Aging legs require surprise over endurance.
key_patterns: Dropped on sustained climbs before summit/descent across multiple Grand Tours (2017, 2020).
Exceptional domestique pacing on flat/valley sections for GC groups (2019, 2023).
Tactical race IQ: bonus second theft, opportunistic short attacks, breakaway positioning.
Unable to contest finales against top sprinters despite good positioning (SAGAN, KRISTOFF).
Veteran opportunism targeting chaos and technical finishes over pure power confrontations.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows exceptional domestique value but aging legs require tactical surprise over sustained efforts, suggesting role refinement rather than decline.
